/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/chat_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/connection_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/message_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/database_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/cache_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/protocol_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qqchat_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o qqchat_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
